creator: bram@cbbg.nl
text:
Created attachment 244420
Minor modifications for enc(4) and ipsec(4)

# enc(4)
Changed the order of the *out* and *in* rows to match the text below. This makes it easier to read. Fixed a typo 0x2 -> 0x3

# ipsec(4)
The original text used the phrase 'to properly filter'. This kind of implies that otherwise the filtering is done, but not properly. This ambiguity is now removed and the default action is clarified.
